subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou knowest that I cherish the branches of the Tree of Thy Singleness and the leaves of the Tree of Thy Oneness. Thou art [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تعلم بانی احب افنان سدره فردانیتک و اوراق شجره وحدانیتک انت
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
